query:
UPDATE addon 
            SET 
            is_enabled = ?,
            is_symbolic_link = ?,
            main_python_file_path = ?,
            installation_directory = ?,
            variant_type = ?,
            functional_name = ?,
            name = ?,
            author = ?,
            version = ?,
            blender_version = ?,
            location = ?,
            description = ?,
            warning = ?,
            documentation_url = ?,
            tracker_url = ?,
            support = ?,
            category = ?,
            parent_blender_version_id = ?,
            modified = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
            WHERE id = ?
